narrative:
Sheffield Lake City has 5,738 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.1 percentage points.
